blockers: The requested external PLANS.md reference file was unavailable at the provided absolute path, so repo-local adaptation is being used.

handoff_rules: Read the plan before editing files.

Append new checkpoints to progress.jsonl instead of rewriting prior entries.
Do not create markdown task files or tasks/ directories.
